race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Hcp (55)
race.comment: AMORE SIRENA (8) was in the money two starts back at this track but couldn't back it up last time when sixth, beaten 4.5 lengths, at Dalby over 1000m. Has her share of talent and will prove hard to beat in this suitable race. EXOSTOVA (6) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race when he did his best work late and finished 3 lengths away in fourth last time out over 800m at Warwick. Taking on a better line-up this time but he cannot be taken lightly. RUSSIAN RIPPER (7) is a bit hit or miss but is more than capable enough on his day. In the mix on best figures. BOLD AS BRASS (2) only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome.
